description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gradle:alpine Docker image and sets the GRADLE_OPTS variable to -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false. Define a global before_script that runs `export GRADLE_USER_HOME=`pwd`/.gradle`. Add a build stage with a job named build that runs `gradle --build-cache assemble`, caches the `build` and `.gradle` directories with a key of $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME and a push policy, and publishes any `build/libs/*.jar` files as artifacts. Add a test stage with a job named test that pulls the same cache (key $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME) for `build` and `.gradle` and runs `gradle check`. The pipeline runs the build job first, then the test job, with no special branch or tag rules.
